name: flutter-mvvm-devkit
description: Create Flutter MVVM template projects with project-local Codex skills for follow-up development.

interface.shortDescription: Create Flutter MVVM apps with project-local follow-up skills.
interface.longDescription: Provides a Flutter MVVM project generator. Generated apps include reusable base views, sealed page navigation, common alert/action sheet UI, Dio ApiService real/mock examples, Product Preview, and project-local Codex skills for follow-up development.
defaultPrompt: Use $flutter-mvvm-template to create a Flutter MVVM app.
Create a Flutter MVVM app named My App.
Scaffold a Flutter MVVM template project with package com.example.myapp.
